operational_boundaries.name: Public Trip Surface
operational_boundaries.scope: Selected trips that the organizer chooses to expose publicly.

operational_boundaries.name: Private Event Workspace
operational_boundaries.scope: Selected subset of approved trip members.
operational_boundaries.rule: Events remain private to chosen participants and do not automatically surface in the main trip ledger.

operational_boundaries.name: Organizer-Controlled Financial Surface
operational_boundaries.scope: Trip-wide pooled contributions and payout ownership.

operational_boundaries.name: Member-Contributed Content Surface
operational_boundaries.scope: Content and records uploaded by approved members.
operational_boundaries.rule: Members can contribute freely within the visibility constraints of the trip or event they are part of.

operational_boundaries.name: Source-of-Truth Receipt Data
operational_boundaries.scope: Original receipt record and extracted raw values.

operational_boundaries.name: Display-Translated Receipt Data
operational_boundaries.scope: Localized view generated from original receipt data.
operational_boundaries.rule: Localized display data never overrides original receipt values in MVP.
